purpose: Run a bounded SAT-like station-variable search for WXYZTI row/register generation.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This searches station-variable consistency over projected row supports.
Candidate station assignments are not source derivations.
The salvaged IW subgrammar is used only as a hint, not proof.
Mode 2 mirror remains projection-level evidence and is not promoted here.

interpretation.main_result: No strict station-variable generator was found in this bounded SAT-like search.
interpretation.why_it_matters: This search tests whether WXYZTI roles can be generated by station variables and chain closure, rather than by row-local selectors.
interpretation.salvaged_hint: The IW non-lookup core remains useful as a hint, not as proof.
interpretation.why_not_closure: Even a station assignment is only a candidate unless the station variables are derived from the source carrier rather than fit to the projection rows.
interpretation.next_move: Record the station-variable obstruction and decide whether to search a richer grammar or stop Gap A as open.

claim.short_form: No strict station-variable generator was found in this bounded SAT-like search.
claim.not_closed_reason: Even a station assignment is only a candidate unless the station variables are derived from the source carrier rather than fit to the projection rows.
claim.next_problem: Record the station-variable obstruction and decide whether to search a richer grammar or stop Gap A as open.
